data.title: Lobby Finance Vote-Buying on Arbitrum Raises Alarms Over DAO Security and Governance Integrity
data.description:
Arbitrum DAO faces scrutiny as vote-buying through Lobby Finance sparks debate over decentralized governance, highlighting vulnerabilities in token-weighted voting systems and calls for reform within blockchain-based decision-making processes.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/vote-buying-sparks-arbitrum-dao-vote-security-concerns/

data.title: User spends $10k to control $6.5M in votes on Arbitrum DAO, sparks governance concerns
data.description:
A recent vote-buying incident within Arbitrum DAO has raised concerns about the viability of decentralized governance as investors exploit on-chain mechanisms to acquire influence through borrowed voting power. According to an April 8 report by crypto analyst Ignas, a user identified as hitmonlee. eth spent 5 Ethereum (ETH), approximately $10,000, to obtain 19. 3 million ARB tokens’ […] The post User spends $10k to control $6
source: https://cryptoslate.com/user-spends-10k-to-control-6-5m-in-votes-on-arbitrum-dao-sparks-governance-concerns/

data.title: Cathie Woods’ Ark Invest ignores market downturn, adds $13.3M to Coinbase position
data.description:
While global markets tumbled at the start of the week, Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest went against the grain by acquiring more shares across two of its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) on Monday, signaling continued confidence in high-growth tech and crypto-linked companies. The investment firm purchased $13. 3 million worth of Coinbase Global Inc. shares, with one of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ark-invest-adds-to-coinbase-position/

data.title: SEC Commissioner's Opposition May Hinder Stablecoin Legislation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a report from TD Cowen highlights that U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw's opposition to classifying stablecoins as "non-securities" could pose a new challenge for stablecoin legislation. Crenshaw criticized the SEC for underestimating the risks associated with stablecoins, stating that the recent declaration by the SEC, which claimed that stablecoins backed by reserves and easily redeemable do not constitute securities, is flawed both legally and factually.

Crenshaw expressed concerns that intermediaries might not redeem stablecoins at a 1:1 ratio with the U.S. dollar, posing risks to investors. Although different versions of stablecoin regulatory drafts have been advanced in both houses of Congress, the internal disagreements within the SEC, particularly Crenshaw's stance, could affect legislative consensus, especially in the Senate where Democratic support is crucial.

Additionally, Maxine Waters, the Democratic leader of the House Financial Services Committee, voiced concerns over former President Trump's involvement in cryptocurrency policy. She warned that the legislation might pave the way for entrepreneurs like Elon Musk to issue stablecoins.

data.title: Bioscience Firm Combines Ancient DNA and Science to Bring Back the Dire Wolf
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/313928/bioscience-company-combines-ancient-dna-science-to-bring-back-dire-wolf

data.title: Crypto Analyst Hints at ‘Most Legendary’ Bottom for Bitcoin, Updates Outlook on Ethereum and XRP
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst says Bitcoin (BTC) may be on the verge of a massive bullish reversal after correcting into the $70,000 range. Closely followed strategist Credible Crypto tells his 466,700 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin may be printing a bullish triple-bottom reversal pattern on the four-hour chart.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/08/crypto-analyst-hints-at-most-legendary-bottom-for-bitcoin-updates-outlook-on-ethereum-and-xrp/
